data.title: Write RED test for run-overlay-retrospective.sh default output path
data.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

Write a failing test that verifies run-overlay-retrospective.sh does NOT write dev artifacts to plugins/dso/docs/. The test must FAIL (RED) against the current source (output path is plugins/dso/docs/overlay-calibration-baselines.md).

## Implementation Steps
1. Create tests/hooks/test-run-overlay-retrospective-path.sh (chmod +x)
2. Source tests/lib/assert.sh
3. Implement test_default_output_not_in_plugin_dir:
   - Read plugins/dso/scripts/run-overlay-retrospective.sh source
   - Extract the default OUTPUT= line
   - Assert the extracted path does NOT contain 'plugins/dso/'
   - Assert it DOES contain 'docs/findings/' (or assert it does NOT match the banned pattern)
4. Add .test-index entry: plugins/dso/scripts/run-overlay-retrospective.sh:tests/hooks/test-run-overlay-retrospective-path.sh [test_default_output_not_in_plugin_dir]

Given: run-overlay-retrospective.sh source is read as text
When: the default OUTPUT= assignment is extracted and inspected
Then: the path does not contain plugins/dso/ (currently FAILS — path is plugins/dso/docs/overlay-calibration-baselines.md)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] tests/hooks/test-run-overlay-retrospective-path.sh exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x tests/hooks/test-run-overlay-retrospective-path.sh
- [ ] Test asserts default output path does not contain plugins/dso/
  Verify: grep -q 'plugins/dso' tests/hooks/test-run-overlay-retrospective-path.sh
- [ ] Test FAILS (RED) against unmodified run-overlay-retrospective.sh
  Verify: bash tests/hooks/test-run-overlay-retrospective-path.sh 2>&1 | grep -q 'FAIL:'
- [ ] .test-index entry added with RED marker for run-overlay-retrospective.sh
  Verify: grep 'run-overlay-retrospective.sh' .test-index | grep -q '\[test_default_output_not_in_plugin_dir\]'
- [ ] validate.sh --ci passes (RED marker gates the failing test)
  Verify: plugins/dso/scripts/validate.sh --ci
